name: sdlc-workflow
description: Complete SDLC plugin: 20 agents across 6 phases, 14 skills including code quality standards and caveman mode, 9 orchestrator commands. Build products with enforced linting, testing pyramid, SAST/SCA scanning, CI/CD gates, and comprehensive documentation.

Code quality enforcement: linting, testing pyramid, SAST/SCA, CI/CD gates
